body: {"rationale":"Strong bead overall. Title is imperative and names subsystem + change. Description contains PROBLEM, ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE (three specific locations), PROPOSED FIX, and NON-SCOPE. AC items are numbered, specific, and include named test functions and a go test filter. Labels include phase, area (multiple), kind, and cross-refs (spec:FEAT-010, reliability, prevention). Parent is explicit and deps are stated. Minor deductions: (1) AC item 4 ('A shared helper or equivalent test fixture prevents...') is a design constraint, not a verifiable assertion — it lacks a named test or command to verify it; it could be folded into AC 3 or restated as a structural check. (2) AC items 6 and 7 are the standard gate lines but AC 5 already names the specific run filter, so item 5 partially overlaps 6; this is acceptable but slightly redundant. (3) The bead does not explicitly state 'no deps' inline in the description body (it says it in the PARENT+DEPS section, which is fine). These are minor issues that do not prevent autonomous execution.","score":8,"suggested_fixes":["Rewrite AC item 4 as a verifiable assertion, e.g., 'TestCLIServerPreClaimHook_ErrorPolicyParity imports and calls the shared helper, confirming it is not duplicated inline.' or replace with a structural/compile check command.","Consider collapsing AC items 5 and 6 since 5 is a subset of 6; or keep both and note that 5 is the targeted smoke run and 6 is the full package gate."],"waivers_applied":[]}
